title: Bayazid's Ascent: The Mi'raj of the Mystic
description: Bayazid's vision of ascending through the seven heavens — a mystical mirror of Muhammad's Night Journey.
introduction: Bayazid's vision of ascending through the seven heavens — a mystical mirror of Muhammad's Night Journey.

translation.text: I ascended through heaven after heaven. The angels asked: 'What do you want?' I said: 'I want only God.' At the throne of God, He said: 'What do you want?' I said: 'I want only You.' He said: 'You are Me and I am you.'
